prestazioni: Upgrade the N63B44O2 (4.4L V8 twin-turbo) with a full Akrapovič Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system, including 3.5-inch diameter downpipes with high-flow catalytic converters and a center muffler delete for a 15-18 HP gain and aggressive Alpina-tuned sound profile

Install a Burger Motorsport JB4 piggyback tuner with Alpina B5-specific map 3 (hybrid mode) paired with a Motiv Motorsport Stage 2+ turbo kit featuring Precision 6266 ball-bearing turbos, custom Alpina B5 wastegates, and a CSF intercooler with 50% larger core volume for sustained 700+ HP on 93 octane

Replace the factory ZF 8HP75 transmission with a Level 10 Motorsports Stage 3 valve body and torque converter, featuring a 3,800 RPM stall speed, billet steel internals, and a custom Alpina B5-specific shift logic for 0.15-second faster shifts under WOT
estetica: Fit a Vorsteiner V-RT carbon fiber widebody kit with Alpina B5-specific front fenders (2.5-inch wider than OEM), rear quarter panels (3-inch wider), and a custom Vorsteiner rear diffuser with integrated Alpina B5 badging and dual 4-inch exhaust cutouts

Install OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels in 9.5x20 ET25 front and 11x20 ET30 rear, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 front, 315/25/20 rear) with Alpina B5-specific camber plates for -3.5 degrees front and -2.8 degrees rear

Apply a full 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with Alpina Blue pinstripes (2mm width) along the beltline, paired with a custom Alpina B5 front lip spoiler from AC Schnitzer and a rear wing from 991 GT3 RS (carbon fiber, 30mm adjustable angle) for 120 lbs of downforce at 150 mph
